who: medical billing managers at small clinics processing 5–15 claims/month
offer: For medical billing managers at small clinics processing 5–15 claims/month, manual submission errors cause delayed reimbursements. We automate the conversion of medical billing codes into insurance claim submissions instead of manual claim submission processes.
problem: Manual submission of insurance claims leads to errors and delays.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical billing managers
Indie Hackers posts discussing similar workflows
DM outreach to medical billing managers with demo video
Community forums where medical billing managers share tools
try_it: Let users try user-friendly interface for code entry and error-checking for common billing mistakes on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
